title: alsine groenlandica
intro: Alsine groenlandica, also known as Icelandic pearlwort, is a low-growing, alpine plant native to the Arctic regions of Europe, Asia, and North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Alsine groenlandica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from its leaves or roots, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
